hero.title: From requirement to working software, <accent>in weeks.</accent>
hero.subtitle: We design, build and ship AI-powered SaaS products. Delivery-led, not sales-led.

work.title: Products we are building
work.subtitle: Real products in real markets — across proptech, edtech, sports operations, consumer events and white-label SaaS.

flowdeski.name: FlowDeski
flowdeski.tagline: Run your business. Not your calendar.
flowdeski.description: Multi-tenant SaaS for service businesses: scheduling, invoicing, WhatsApp messaging, AI-generated content, automation rules — re-skinnable per niche.

rentfy.name: Rentfy
rentfy.description: Property management platform for landlords: automated rent collection, tenant CRM, payment reminders and an AI assistant.

riopatinacao.name: Rio Patinação
riopatinacao.description: Built both the public-facing school site and the internal operations platform — students, classes, payments, attendance, contracts — backed by a full BDD/Gherkin acceptance-test suite.

carna26.name: Carna26 Rio
carna26.description: Event-discovery and social-matching app for Rio Carnival 2026, with Stripe-backed premium tiers and a Python-driven data pipeline of real Carnival sources.

mayway.name: Mayway
mayway.description: Early-stage English-learning platform for Brazilian and Portuguese students, with native teachers and tri-lingual experience (EN / pt-BR / pt-PT).

approach.title: Predictable delivery, written down.
approach.subtitle: We protect your time, your budget and your scope by treating requirements as testable specifications — not slide decks.

scope.title: Requirements as tests
scope.description: Every scope item is a BDD scenario. If it passes, it ships. If it doesn't, we know on day one — not on launch day.

cadence.title: Two-week sprint cadence
cadence.description: First working slice in two weeks. Weekly demos. You can change direction at any sprint boundary without re-negotiating the contract.

stack.title: Modern AI-native stack
stack.description: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL and the Vercel AI SDK with OpenRouter — production-tested across every product in our portfolio.

ownership.title: You own the code
ownership.description: Day-one repo access, conventional commits, transparent CI. No black box, no lock-in, no surprise handover invoice.

about.title: An AI software house run by a delivery practitioner.
about.paragraph1: Scintechn is a small, focused AI software house led by an Agile Delivery Lead. We build the kind of products we'd want to use ourselves — and we ship them under the same delivery discipline we'd bring to a product engineering team.
about.paragraph2: Our portfolio spans proptech, edtech, sports operations, consumer events and white-label SaaS — all built on a consistent Next.js + PostgreSQL + AI SDK platform, all shipped under sprint cadence with BDD-verified acceptance criteria.
about.paragraph3: We work with founders and operators who don't have six months to wait — and who'd rather see working software than another estimate.

contact.title: Tell us what you want to build.
contact.subtitle: Briefly describe your project. We respond within one business day with the next steps, scope questions or — if it's not the right fit — a referral.
contact.name: Name
contact.message: What are you trying to build?
contact.successMessage: Thanks — we'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.errorMessage: Please try again, or email us directly at contact@scintechn.com.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

metadata.title: Scintechn — AI Software House
metadata.description: Scintechn is a delivery-led AI software house. We design, build and ship AI-powered SaaS products — from requirement to working software, in weeks.
